commit.subject: LU-6142 obd: Fix style issues for obd_support.h (2/3)
commit.message:
LU-6142 obd: Fix style issues for obd_support.h (2/3)

This patch fixes issues reported by checkpatch
for both files lustre/include/obd_support.h

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Arshad Hussain <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>
Change-Id: I9422cec17baa563060a1a6818c899553e2148564
